body:
i
 
Prepare your fiber installation in a few steps
 
Hello Denys,
 
Good news! Your fiber installation at Engelselei 81, 2140 Borgerhout (Box 5) is coming up soon.
 
To ensure your appointment goes smoothly, we need some details about your home. This will help our technician prepare and save you time on the day of installation.
 
Please take a moment to complete this short survey:
 
Fill out the survey
 
We may contact you if we have any additional questions.
 
Thanks in advance for your time!
The Scarlet team
